ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_packets" (
  "packet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data packet */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* Source IP address of the packet */,
  "destination_ip" TEXT /* Destination IP address of the packet */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the packet was received */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the protocol used */,
  "packet_version" INTEGER /* Version of the packet format */,
  "packet_size" INTEGER /* Size of the packet in bytes */,
  "crc_checksum" TEXT /* CRC checksum for packet validation */,
  "sync1" TEXT /* Sync1 field in the packet header */,
  "sync2" TEXT /* Sync2 field in the packet header */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the packet in bytes */,
  "data" TEXT /* Binary data of the packet */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the packet is valid */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the packet was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the packet was last updated */,
  "packet_type" TEXT /* Type of the packet (e.g., control, data) */,
  "source_port" INTEGER /* Source port number */,
  "destination_port" INTEGER /* Destination port number */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the packet */,
  "retransmission_count" INTEGER /* Number of retransmissions */,
  "encryption_status" INTEGER /* Encryption status of the packet */,
  "packet_sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the packet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("packet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_packets_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("protocol_id") REFERENCES protocols ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protocol */,
  "default_version" INTEGER /* Default version of the protocol */,
  "protocol_status" TEXT /* Status of the protocol (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packet_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each packet version */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the protocol */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the packet format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the version is current */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "deprecation_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was deprecated */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packet_versions_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("protocol_id") REFERENCES protocols ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packet_fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each packet field */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the packet version */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field */,
  "field_type" TEXT /* Data type of the field */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the field */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the field */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the field */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value of the field */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value of the field */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the field is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packet_fields_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES packet_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "field_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field value */,
  "packet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data packet */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the packet field */,
  "field_value" TEXT /* Value of the field in the packet */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of the value (e.g., integer, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_field_values_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES packet_fields ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_field_values_packet_id FOREIGN KEY ("packet_id") REFERENCES data_packets ("packet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packet_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the packet version */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the rule is active */,
  "validation_script" TEXT /* Validation script or function */,
  "validation_priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the validation rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packet_validations_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES packet_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation result */,
  "packet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data packet */,
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the validation rule */,
  "result" INTEGER /* Result of the validation (true/false) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message from the validation process */,
  "validation_duration" REAL /* Duration of the validation process */,
  "validator" TEXT /* Name or ID of the validator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_results_validation_id FOREIGN KEY ("validation_id") REFERENCES packet_validations ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_results_packet_id FOREIGN KEY ("packet_id") REFERENCES data_packets ("packet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packet_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "packet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data packet */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "log_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log entry (e.g., system, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packet_logs_packet_id FOREIGN KEY ("packet_id") REFERENCES data_packets ("packet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "default_role" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the role is the default role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "packet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data packet being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the packet */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the packet was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_packet_id FOREIGN KEY ("packet_id") REFERENCES data_packets ("packet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packet_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "packet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data packet */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., latency, throughput) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the statistic */,
  "stat_source" TEXT /* Source of the statistic (e.g., system, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packet_statistics_packet_id FOREIGN KEY ("packet_id") REFERENCES data_packets ("packet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packet_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error */,
  "packet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data packet */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of error (e.g., validation, parsing) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Message of the error */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the error */,
  "error_source" TEXT /* Source of the error (e.g., system, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packet_errors_packet_id FOREIGN KEY ("packet_id") REFERENCES data_packets ("packet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packet_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "packet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data packet */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., traffic analysis, error summary) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Binary data of the report */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_source" TEXT /* Source of the report (e.g., system, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packet_reports_packet_id FOREIGN KEY ("packet_id") REFERENCES data_packets ("packet_id")
)
